_meta.title: NOVIQ Clinical Coding Workflow Knowledge Base
_meta.source: Dr. Mohamed Kassab — Clinical Coder Competency Assessment

A_pre_coding.label: Pre-Coding
A_pre_coding.objective: Validate episode eligibility and ensure documentation completeness before any coding begins

inpatient_steps.action: Confirm inpatient episode eligibility — admission status, LOS, admission source (ER or OP Clinics)
inpatient_steps.engine_check: episode_type == inpatient AND los_days >= 1 AND admission_source documented

inpatient_steps.action: Retrieve complete medical record — EHR, notes, labs, imaging, OT notes — all documented, valid and verified
inpatient_steps.engine_check: ehr_documents includes: Initial Medical Report, Admission Report, Progress Notes, Operation Notes, Discharge Summary

inpatient_steps.action: Review full record chronologically — admission to discharge — understand medical journey through daily progress notes and management

day_care_steps.action: Review case complexity — multi-diagnosis, ICU, procedures
Check documentation completeness — identify missing notes, unclear diagnoses
Prioritize high-impact cases — DRG weight, LOS outliers, complications

missing_document_flags.Operation Notes: CRITICAL — Cannot assign ACHI codes without OT Notes
missing_document_flags.Discharge Summary: CRITICAL — Cannot confirm PDX without Discharge Summary
missing_document_flags.Progress Notes: HIGH — Cannot score ACS 0002 without Progress Notes
missing_document_flags.Admission Report: HIGH — Cannot validate PDX selection without Admission Report
missing_document_flags.Initial Medical Report: MEDIUM — Mode of injury and external cause may be missed

B_diagnosis_coding.label: Diagnosis Coding
B_diagnosis_coding.objective: Assign accurate PDX (ACS 0001) and ADX (ACS 0002) based on full clinical picture

inpatient_steps.action: Assign Principal Diagnosis — condition chiefly responsible after study, per ACS 0001 — source: Admission + Discharge Report
inpatient_steps.engine_check: pdx is not null AND pdx_source in [Admission Report, Discharge Summary]

inpatient_steps.action: Validate PDX — NOT a symptom unless no confirmed diagnosis. Signs/symptoms at admission may evolve to confirmed PDX after initial management
inpatient_steps.upcoding_check: If symptom coded as PDX when underlying condition confirmed → DOWNCODE
inpatient_steps.leakage_check: If confirmed condition not coded as PDX → REVENUE LEAKAGE

inpatient_steps.action: Identify Additional Diagnoses impacting care — must be scored per ACS 0002 criteria
inpatient_steps.engine_check: all adx have acs_adx_score with action in [code, review, do_not_code]

inpatient_steps.action: Apply significance criteria — filter ADX to code only those with genuine clinical impact. Use Medical Data Adjudication
inpatient_steps.engine_check: adx with action=do_not_code are excluded from final submission
inpatient_steps.upcoding_check: Incidental findings with no treatment impact must NOT be coded
inpatient_steps.leakage_check: Comorbidities altering perioperative management MUST be coded

day_care_steps.action: Analyze competing diagnoses for PDX selection
Apply ACS 0001 rules to confirm correct PDX — etiology vs manifestation distinction
day_care_steps.day_care_note: In day-care, PDX is almost always the condition that brought patient to operating list — wrong PDX misallocates entire MDC
day_care_steps.engine_check: pdx confirmed from clinical indication for procedure

day_care_steps.action: Identify all comorbidities and complications — assess CC/MCC impact on DRG
Differentiate pre-existing vs hospital-acquired conditions — assign Condition Onset Flag

pdx_validation_rules.rule_1: PDX = condition established AFTER study, chiefly responsible for admission
pdx_validation_rules.rule_2: NOT a presenting symptom if an underlying condition is confirmed
pdx_validation_rules.rule_3: NOT a manifestation if the etiology is documented
pdx_validation_rules.rule_4: If multiple conditions compete — select the one consuming most resources
pdx_validation_rules.rule_5: Day-care: PDX = clinical indication for the procedure
pdx_validation_rules.rule_6: Haemodialysis admission: Z49.1 (catheter) or Z99.2 (ongoing dialysis)

c1_therapeutic_treatment.criteria: Commencement or alteration of therapeutic treatment

c2_diagnostic_investigation.criteria: Diagnostic investigation or procedure performed for the condition

c3_increased_clinical_care.criteria: Increased level of clinical care or monitoring

thresholds.do_not_code: score < 3 → Do NOT code (incidental/not impacting care)

adx_acs0002_scoring.dr_kassab_insight: Hardest distinction: true comorbidity altering perioperative management vs incidental finding in record. Apply strict ACS 0002 criteria, not clinical instinct

C_procedure_coding.label: Procedure Coding
C_procedure_coding.objective: Assign accurate ACHI codes — correct block, site, technique, approach

inpatient_steps.action: Identify all procedures — primary source: OT Notes + Discharge Summary
inpatient_steps.engine_check: achi_codes extracted from Operation Notes AND Discharge Summary

inpatient_steps.action: Assign ACHI codes — correct block, site, technique. Calculate ECCS Score per formula and DCL Score for exact AR-DRG weight
inpatient_steps.engine_check: each achi_code has: base_code + modifier + approach_documented

day_care_steps.action: Capture all significant procedures affecting DRG grouping
day_care_steps.day_care_note: Anaesthesia codes (Block 925, ACS 0031) mandatory for day-care
day_care_steps.engine_check: anaesthesia_code in achi_codes if procedure performed

achi_assembly_rules.rule_1: Base code from ACHI Volume 3 (Alphabetic Index)
achi_assembly_rules.rule_2: Modifier determined by: approach (lap/open/robotic) + site (bilateral/unilateral) + technique
achi_assembly_rules.rule_5: ECCS = sum of complexity contributions per ACHI code
achi_assembly_rules.rule_6: DCL = Diagnosis Complexity Level — combined with ECCS for AR-DRG split

D_sequencing_external_cause.label: Sequencing & External Cause
D_sequencing_external_cause.objective: Correct code sequencing and complete external cause + COF assignment

inpatient_steps.action: Sequence procedures by resource significance — decide if procedure is standalone or part of main procedure
Assign External Cause codes for injury/poisoning — Mode of trauma in ER cases — Insurance exclusion check
inpatient_steps.engine_check: if injury_case: external_cause + Y92_place + Y93_activity all present
inpatient_steps.insurance_flag: Mode of injury determines policy exclusion — CRITICAL for claim approval

inpatient_steps.action: Assign Condition Onset Flag — POA vs hospital-acquired. Impacts case mortality rate and complication coding

day_care_steps.action: Sequence diagnoses correctly — PDX first, then ADX by clinical impact hierarchy
day_care_steps.engine_check: pdx is first, adx ordered by impact

day_care_steps.action: Assign external cause codes with full detail — activity + place
day_care_steps.engine_check: external_cause + Y92 + Y93 all present if injury

cof_rules.cof_1: Hospital-acquired condition — arose DURING this admission
cof_rules.cof_2: Present on admission — documented before or at time of admission
cof_rules.engine_logic: If condition appears only in Progress Notes (not Admission Report) → likely COF 1

external_cause_mandatory_trio.code_1: External cause code — cause and intent of injury
external_cause_mandatory_trio.code_3: Y93.— or U50-U73 — Activity at time of injury

E_grouping_qa.label: Grouping & QA
E_grouping_qa.objective: Validate AR-DRG assignment and ensure coding integrity before submission

inpatient_steps.action: Validate all codes against documentation — DCL contribution, ECCS score, Appendix C, F25 rules
inpatient_steps.engine_check: dcl_validated AND eccs_calculated AND appendix_c_checked AND f25_gate_checked

inpatient_steps.action: Apply relevant ACS for common cases — sepsis, diabetes, post-op complications

common_cases.anaemia: Only if transfusion given or iron therapy commenced

inpatient_steps.action: Run AR-DRG grouper — get exact code weight transformed into procedure value and cost
inpatient_steps.engine_check: ar_drg != ERROR_DRG AND ar_drg != 960Z AND ar_drg != 961Z

inpatient_steps.action: Validate DRG vs clinical scenario — LOS alignment, CC/MCC check, admission scenario consistency
inpatient_steps.engine_check: los_days consistent with ar_drg_expected_los AND cc_mcc_captured

day_care_steps.action: Run DRG and analyze output — flag unexpected grouping
Validate DRG vs clinical picture — LOS, ICU, procedures alignment
Check CC/MCC capture accuracy — identify missed complications
day_care_steps.leakage_check: If CC/MCC not captured but documented → flag for physician review

day_care_steps.action: Perform internal audit — code consistency and guideline adherence

error_drg_rules.960Z: Ungroupable — invalid code combination → review and re-code
error_drg_rules.engine_action: If ar_drg in [960Z, 961Z] → BLOCK submission, return to Phase B

los_vs_drg_validation.rule: Procedures must align with total admission days
los_vs_drg_validation.short_stay_flag: LOS < expected DRG lower trim → verify all procedures coded
los_vs_drg_validation.long_stay_flag: LOS > expected DRG upper trim → check for complications or comorbidities missed

F_submission.label: Submission
F_submission.objective: Final physician approval and claim submission

steps.action: Query clinician for unclear/incomplete documentation — enhances clinical optimization before submission, decreases denials
Finalize and submit coded case — include RAG system and logical terms behind every code

rule_01_pdx_definition.rule: PDX must be the diagnosis established AFTER study, chiefly responsible for the episode
rule_01_pdx_definition.check: pdx is not a symptom code (R-codes) unless no confirmed diagnosis documented

rule_02_adx_criteria.rule: ADX must meet ACS 0002: therapeutic treatment + diagnostic investigation + increased care
rule_02_adx_criteria.check: each adx has acs_score with documented evidence for at least one criterion

rule_03_cof_assignment.rule: COF 1 = hospital-acquired. COF 2 = present on admission

rule_04_anaesthesia_code.rule: Anaesthesia codes = Block 925 (1909-1911), governed by ACS 0031
rule_04_anaesthesia_code.check: if procedure under GA or regional: anaesthesia_achi_code present

rule_05_external_cause_trio.rule: Injury admissions require: External cause + Y92 (place) + Y93/U50-U73 (activity)
rule_05_external_cause_trio.check: if injury_admission: external_cause_code AND Y92_code AND Y93_code all present
rule_05_external_cause_trio.insurance_risk: Incomplete external cause = policy exclusion risk

rule_06_haemodialysis_zcode.rule: Haemodialysis: Z49.1 (catheter maintenance) or Z99.2 (ongoing dialysis management)

rule_08_error_drg.rule: Error DRG 960Z (Ungroupable) or 961Z (Unacceptable PDX) → must be corrected before submission
rule_08_error_drg.fail_action: BLOCK_SUBMISSION — return to Phase B for re-coding

rule_09_post_op_complications.rule: Post-procedural complications coded per ACS 0017 + COF 1 assigned

rule_10_ambiguous_documentation.rule: Ambiguous documentation → formal clinician query. Coder must NOT assume
rule_10_ambiguous_documentation.note: Coding must reflect documented clinical reality, not clinical inference

rule_11_same_day_acs.rule: Same-day cases: apply ACS 0010 + ACS 0001 + ACS 0016 + ACS 0031

rule_12_icd_lookup_sequence.rule: ICD-10-AM lookup: Volume 2 (Alphabetic Index) → Volume 1 (Tabular List) — both steps mandatory

intent_agent.primary_task: Extract PDX, ADX, ACHI from EHR documents using KB v4 protocol

medical_logic_agent.primary_task: Apply clinical logic — PDX validation, COF assignment, external cause completeness

ar_drg_engine.primary_task: Calculate ECCS, apply DCL, run AR-DRG grouper, validate result

critique_agent.primary_task: Final integrity check — upcoding protection, revenue leakage detection, submission gate

inpatient.pdx_note: Condition established AFTER study — may differ from presenting complaint

day_care.pdx_note: Almost always the clinical indication for the procedure

sepsis.adx: Underlying source must be coded (e.g. UTI, pneumonia)

diabetes.adx_rule: Only code if treatment was altered (insulin sliding scale = code). Stable DM on same meds = do not code

post_op_complication.note: Distinguish routine post-op observation from reportable complication

anaemia.adx_rule: Only code if transfusion given or iron/EPO therapy commenced

hypertension.adx_rule: Code if antihypertensives adjusted or added. Do not code if pre-existing on same medications

intent_agent_prompt_blocks.phase_A_pre_coding: Before extracting any codes: verify document completeness. Required: Admission Report + OT Notes + Discharge Summary. Flag any missing documents with severity.
intent_agent_prompt_blocks.phase_B_pdx_selection: PDX = condition established AFTER study, chiefly responsible for admission. NOT a symptom if underlying condition confirmed. Source of truth: Discharge Summary. Override Initial Medical Report if Discharge Summary differs.
intent_agent_prompt_blocks.phase_B_adx_scoring: Score EACH additional diagnosis individually using ACS 0002: C1=3pts (treatment altered), C2=2pts (investigation performed), C3=2pts (increased care). Only diagnoses with score>=5 are coded. Score 3-4 = physician review. Score<3 = do not code.
intent_agent_prompt_blocks.phase_C_achi_assembly: ACHI code = Base Code + Modifier. Base from OT Notes procedure name. Modifier from approach (lap=00, open=01, robotic=02) + site (bilateral vs unilateral). Anaesthesia = Block 925 mandatory if GA/regional.
intent_agent_prompt_blocks.phase_D_external_cause: Injury cases require THREE codes: (1) External cause, (2) Y92 place of occurrence, (3) Y93/U50-U73 activity. Incomplete external cause = insurance exclusion risk.
intent_agent_prompt_blocks.phase_E_drg_validation: After grouper: check (1) no error DRG 960Z/961Z, (2) LOS consistent with DRG, (3) CC/MCC captured. If LOS > upper trim: look for missed complications.
intent_agent_prompt_blocks.phase_F_submission_gate: Final check before approve: all 12 validation rules passed, physician queries resolved, no upcoding flags, no revenue leakage flags.
